## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule (deterministic)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / tests only

## Testing
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes with no new failures
- [ ] `ruff check app/ tests/` clean
- [ ] If adding a rule: eval sample + expected file added under `backend/eval/`
- [ ] Manual test against a real code snippet

## Checklist
- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] New rules have a test fixture in `tests/fixtures/` or eval sample
- [ ] Breaking changes are noted below

<!-- List any breaking changes, or write "None" -->
